name: TA-65 metabolic syndrome completed registry
summary: Completed randomized double-masked crossover TA-65 registry in metabolic syndrome, with insulin resistance, oxidative stress, and inflammation endpoints.
population: Estimated 40 adults aged 32 to 70 years with metabolic syndrome

trial_details.watch_status_reason: Registry text records actual primary completion in December 2017 and actual study completion in June 2018; the June 15, 2026 API check still found no posted registry results. PMID 29546832 appears title- and enrollment-matched and should be resolved before any retirement decision.
trial_details.expected_results_window: ClinicalTrials.gov lists actual primary completion in December 2017 and actual study completion in June 2018, with no posted registry results in the June 15, 2026 API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: Completed no-results registry context, not evidence of benefit.
trial_details.why_it_matters: This record preserves a completed TA-65 metabolic registry as a future publication/results watch item; the likely PMID 29546832 publication match needs evidence review before the row is retired or converted to results_captured.
